description: convert one CT DICOM series folder to a HU NIfTI volume with affine + axcodes evidence
rules: read-only on the input DICOM directory
single-series CT only; multi-series is rejected at preflight
slices sorted by ImagePositionPatient; RescaleSlope/Intercept applied to produce HU
affine + axcodes derived from DICOM headers (no auto-reorientation)
usage: Set DICOM_DIR (the single-series CT DICOM directory). Outputs: volume.nii.gz (the NIfTI) and result.json (the evidence summary with n_slices, shape, spacing, affine, axcodes, hu_range).
limitation: Single-series only; multi-frame DICOM (NumberOfFrames > 1) and compressed transfer syntaxes (JPEG/JPEG2000/RLE) unsupported; no voxel reorientation; inconsistent slice spacing is reported but not auto-corrected. Engineering verification only — not for clinical deployment, diagnosis, regulatory submission, or production inference.
